metadata.source: ESPN site scoreboard (games/scores/status/teams) + ESPN core API (historical odds), pulled once for offline test data
metadata.note: Weeks 1-13 carry ESPN BET stand-in lines (labeled per game). Weeks 14-18 and the wk13 NYG@NE game were backfilled with REAL ESPN-core lines (predominantly DraftKings) pulled on backfill, each labeled by its actual provider — superseding the earlier claim that 2025 has no DraftKings odds anywhere. Any game still without a usable line is reported in games_without_odds.
